title: hemizonia corymbosa
intro: Hemizonia corymbosa, also known as the tarweed or annual tarweed, is a plant species native to the coastal regions of California and Oregon in the United States. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hemizonia corymbosa include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Hemizonia corymbosa can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
